channel.title: slack on Jacob Sanford
channel.description: Recent content in slack on Jacob Sanford

item.title: Hodor for Slack
item.description: Long awaited fresh updates to the famous Hodor for Slack bot Docker Image. My life’s work, it leverages python-rtmbot and python-rtmbot-hodor to monitor any mentions of Hodor’s name in a Slack channel and reply with a message: Hodor’s replies are determined by mood. The ‘mood’ of reply is determined by comparing the content of the triggering message against a library of words and human interpreted intent scoring. After mood assignment, a message is chosen based on a ‘item drop’ type selection process that allows for weighting of responses.
